archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) infused with Archetype 1 (Organic Trust)
design_philosophy: Modern startup style like Airbnb and Zomato. Clean, trustworthy, heavily focused on high-quality imagery, clear typography, and a vibrant primary accent color to drive conversions. Frictionless mobile experience with generous spacing and smooth micro-interactions.

typography.rules: Never center-align large blocks of text. Ensure text contrast against backgrounds using APCA standards. Headers must be tight and expressive.

spacing_and_layout.rules: Use generous padding. Prevent image bleeding into text areas. Always leave breathing room around main CTA buttons. Cards should use rounded-2xl to match modern mobile aesthetics.

cards.style: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#EBEBEB] shadow-sm overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF385C] rounded-xl py-4 px-6 items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-[#222222] rounded-xl py-3 px-6 items-center justify-center
buttons.filter_chip: bg-[#F7F7F7] border border-[#EBEBEB] rounded-full py-2 px-4 flex-row items-center

inputs.style: bg-[#F7F7F7] rounded-xl px-4 py-4 text-base border border-transparent focus:border-[#222222] focus:bg-white transition-all
inputs.label: text-sm font-semibold text-[#222222] mb-2

bottom_tabs.style: bg-white border-t border-[#EBEBEB] pt-2 pb-6 px-4 flex-row justify-around

image_urls.description: Modern bedroom with large window, used for room listing details.
Stylish neutral bedroom, ideal for list view cards.

media.rules: All listing images must have a 4:3 or 1:1 aspect ratio on lists, and 4:3 on details view. Never use placeholder URLs. Avatars must be rounded-full with object-cover.

icons.rules: Use consistent stroke width. Solid variants only for active states (e.g., active tab, favorited).

animations_and_motion.screen_transitions: Slide from right for navigation, modal slide up for filters.
animations_and_motion.interactions: Scale down to 0.98 on button press.
animations_and_motion.image_carousel: Smooth snap-to-interval scrolling with pagination dots.

testing.rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, list items) MUST have a testID attribute matching the pattern 'screen-element-role' (e.g., testID='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use NativeWind or standard React Native StyleSheet strictly adhering to the colors and typography scales defined here.
Implement the UI using a Mobile-First approach, optimized for touch targets (min 44x44px for buttons/icons).
For Glassmorphism in React Native, use expo-blur (BlurView) instead of CSS backdrop-filter.
Forms should use KeyboardAvoidingView and ScrollView to ensure inputs remain accessible.
Integrate the exact media URLs provided for listings and avatars; no dummyimage or placeholders.
Owner dashboard stats cards should use a grid layout. In React Native, use flex-row and flex-wrap with 48% width per item.
Use Manrope for headings and Work Sans for body. Load these using expo-font.
